metas.name: One Punch Man 3 Part 2
metas.description: Genres: Action, Comedy, Sci-Fi, Supernatural Tags:Superhero/Super Power/Seinen/Urban Fantasy/Male Protagonist/Primarily Adult Cast/Primarily Male Cast The second cour of the third season of One Punch Man.

metas.name: THE ONE PIECE
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure Tags:Pirates/Ensemble Cast/Travel/Shounen/Found Family/Super Power/Male Protagonist/Ships/Politics/Primarily Adult Cast/Anti-Hero/Swordplay To commemorate the ONE PIECE anime's 25th anniversary: THE ONE PIECE anime by WIT Studio will recreate the story of the original ONE PIECE manga, starting from the East Blue arc.

(Source: Netflix, edited)

metas.name: GATE 2: Jieitai Kano Umi nite, Kaku Tatakaeri
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy Tags:Isekai/Reverse Isekai Thanks to the efforts of Lieutenant Yoji Itami (now Lieutenant First Class) of the Japan Ground Self-Defense Force, the once-closed "GATE" has safely reopened. The Japanese government, determined to maintain exclusive control over the "GATE", continues mobilizing the Self-Defense Forces for political and topographical surveys to build a peaceful relationship with the inhabitants of the Special Region. Captain First Class Edajima Goro of the Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force (JMSDF) and his subordinate, Petty Officer Second Class Tokushima Hajime, a skilled former chef, were conducting such diplomatic and investigative missions, traveling across the various nations of the Special Region.

However, one day, their assignment suddenly escalates when they're tasked with a special mission to rescue an American journalist kidnapped on an island in the Special Region's Blue Sea.

Immediately boarding the JMSDF Oyashio-class submarine Kitashio, they set sail into the ocean of another world, discovering the area around the Blue Sea engulfed in turmoil, with archipelago nations and pirates battling fiercely for dominance.

(Source: GATE 2: Tides of Conflict Site)

metas.name: Boku no Kokoro no Yabai Yatsu 3rd Season
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Romance, Slice of Life Tags:School/Heterosexual/Coming of Age/Male Protagonist/Female Protagonist/Primarily Teen Cast/Shounen The third season of Boku no Kokoro no Yabai Yatsu.

metas.name: Haikyuu!!: Bakemono-tachi no Iku Tokoro
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Drama, Sports Tags: The quarterfinals of the Spring High School Volleyball Tournament, featuring Fukuroudani Academy, led by Koutarou Bokuto, and Mujinazaka High, led by Wakatsu Kiryuu.

(Source: Official Site, translated)

metas.name: Yuru Camp△ SEASON 4
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Slice of Life Tags:Outdoor Activities/Cute Girls Doing Cute Things/Iyashikei/Female Protagonist/Seinen/Camping/Travel The fourth season of Yuru Camp△.

metas.name: Guimi Zhi Zhu: Wu Mian Ren
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, Mystery, Suspense
Tags: Adult Cast/Isekai
After his resurrection, Klein, now known as Sherlock, becomes a private detective. While taking on cases, he inadvertently provokes a spy organization. With the help of his bodyguard Sharron, as well as the assistance of Audrey and others, he faces many enemies, including the powerful Ambassador of Intis. In a later case, Klein unexpectedly discovers ruins from the Tudor dynasty. While continuing his detective work, Klein searches for clues to his advancement while also pursuing his enemies, Lanevus and Intis…

(Source: Tencent, translated & edited)

metas.name: Mairimashita! Iruma-kun: If Episode of Mafia
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Comedy Tags:Shounen/Male Protagonist/Mafia/Ensemble Cast/Gangs In this brand-new spinoff of the runaway hit series, Iruma is a dirt-poor but kind young boy who grows up in a ruthless city slum. One day, Iruma gives a severely injured old man his last loaf of bread and nurses the stranger back to health—only to find out that the elder gent is none other than Don Sullivan, leader of the Babel Mafia! Soon after, Don Sullivan comes back, whisks Iruma away, and begs the boy to become his grandson. And just like that, the curtains rise on Iruma’s chaotic new life as the next in line to a gigantic gang of—dare we saydemonic mafiosos!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

metas.name: CHERRY AND VIRGIN
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Romance Tags:Heterosexual/Rotoscoping/Mixed Media/Primarily Adult Cast Cherry and Virgin is a romantic comedy featuring a 32-year-old "eromanga" author Ryou and a 28-year-old "fujoshi'' Ami. Neither character is great at interacting with members of the opposite gender—Ryou is somewhat of an otaku and defenseless against women, and Ami does not have a good impression of 3D men. After a fateful encounter, the story follows the two as they learn to navigate a sea of interpersonal relationships and come to better understand the bitter and sweet aspects of modern relationships.

(Source: MAL News)

metas.name: Medalist Movie
metas.description: Genres: Drama, Psychological, Sports Tags:Ice Skating/Female Protagonist/Coming of Age/Male Protagonist/Athletics/Seinen Sequel to Medalist 2nd Season.

metas.name: Akuyaku Reijou no Naka no Hito
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Fantasy Tags:Revenge/Female Protagonist/Villainess/Dissociative Identities/Shoujo/Ojou-sama/Isekai/Magic A girl who had reincarnated as Remilia, the villainess of an otome game tries to clear her name. However, the real Remilia who had been watching all along inside awakens.

Now it's time for the true villainess' revenge to begin!

(Source: Ichijinsha, translated)

metas.name: Boukyaku Battery (TV) 2nd Season
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Sports Tags:Shounen/Baseball/Primarily Male Cast/School Club The second season of Boukyaku Battery (TV).

metas.name: BanG Dream! It's MyGO!!!!! / Ave Mujica (Zoku-hen)
metas.description:
Genres: Music Tags:Female Protagonist/Band/Primarily Female Cast/Yuri Sequel series to BanG Dream! It's MyGO!!!!! and BanG Dream! Ave Mujica.

Note: Title is provisional and subject to change when more info is announced.

metas.name: Historié
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Drama, Psychological Tags:Historical/Gore/Body Horror/Seinen/Medieval After shocking the world with Parasyte, Hitoshi Iwaaki is back with a series he's been aching to tackle since even before his pro manga debut! A historical epic set in ancient times, Historie tells the story of Eumenes, a young man with quick wits and a vast destiny to fulfill. In time, he'll become a famed army commander and personal secretary to Alexander the Great—but the road to this glory is fraught with danger… "

(Source: K Manga)

metas.name: ghost (Provisional Title)
metas.description:
Genres: Supernatural Tags:Female Protagonist Everyone has a "ghost" in their hearts. It is a genuine feeling that is there but inexpressible. In this work, the girl Nike opposes the absurdity of the world in order to protect the "starry sky." This challenging work expresses Nike's solitude and heroism, and the subtleties of the heart as she interacts with others.

(Source: Bandai Namco Filmworks Press Release via Anime News Network)

metas.name: Hirayasumi
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Drama, Slice of Life Tags:Iyashikei/Family Life/Seinen/Primarily Adult Cast With a carefree outlook on life, Hiroto knows better than anyone that slowing down is sometimes the best way to move forward.

At 29 years old, carefree Hiroto Ikuta doesn’t have a girlfriend, a full-time job, or a plan for the future—and he couldn’t be happier. Hiroto’s breezy attitude isn’t easy for everyone to understand, though. In a world filled with anxiety, confusion, and grief, Hiroto and the people who surround him are all just doing their best to figure out this thing called life.

After developing an unlikely friendship with the grouchy old granny who lives in his neighborhood, Hiroto suddenly finds himself inheriting not just her house, but some rather difficult emotions as well. His 18-year-old cousin Natsumi moves in with him, but as a struggling art student, she has her own troubles to deal with and may just put Hiroto’s easygoing lifestyle to the test.

(Source: VIZ Media)

metas.name: Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club
metas.description: Genres: Music, Slice of Life Tags:Idol/Female Protagonist/Primarily Female Cast/Ensemble Cast Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change when more info is announced.

metas.name: Bless
metas.description:
Genres: Slice of Life Tags:Makeup/Fashion They said Aia was destined to be a model, and Jun was bullied for her freckles. Together, they will take back the power to define themselves in an inspirational fashion manga that asks cutting questions about what it really means to be beautiful—and what it takes to overcome an arbitrary system that seems to respect talent over hard work.

(Source: Kodansha USA)

metas.name: Majo to Youhei
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist/Witch/Magic Nothing in this world is more dangerous than a witch. The epitome of fear and terror, they can summon floods on a whim, conjure balls of fire out of the air, or even destroy entire countries overnight. Incur their wrath, and no one is safe.

At least, that’s what everyone thinks, and it’s the very reason they all want Siasha dead. After yet another violent battle for her life, she teams up with Zig, a mercenary, and they depart for unknown lands to find somewhere she can live in peace. But is the pair any match for the lost magic and vicious monstrosities that lie ahead?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Ghost of Tsushima: Legends
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure Tags:Samurai/Assassins Crunchyroll announced during Sony Group Corporation’s CES 2025 press conference that an anime series based on Sucker Punch Productions’ Ghost of Tsushima video game and its Ghost of Tsushima: Legends multiplayer experience is officially in production. The anime will exclusively premiere on Crunchyroll in 2027.

(Source: Crunchyroll News)

metas.name: Matsurika Kanriden
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Fantasy, Romance Tags:Royal Affairs/Shoujo Matsurika, a female officer in the Inner Palace, had a little special skill, and that was "a better memory" than others. One day, she accepted a request to become a practice partner for a marriage meeting of a certain son of a distinguished family. However, the one who appeared was the Emperor, Hakuyou, who wanted to try having a marriage meeting?! And interested in Matsurika's special skill, Hakuyou even said, "For now, go and pass the civil exam"...?!

A Chinese-style Cinderella story between an emperor and a girl!

(Source: Kadokawa, translated)

metas.name: Kaze wo Tsugumono
metas.description:
Genres: Action Tags:Samurai/Female Protagonist During the Bakumatsu era in the city of Kyoto, a soldier, his memories lost, is aided by Soji Okita, assistant officer of the Mibu Roshigumi.

"Your name is Jinsuke Tachikawa."

Jinsuke's life begins anew living among the Mibu soldiers.

Portraying the fleeting youth of these young people who lived in turbulent times, this original anime will bring their stories to life with sharp detail and a fresh perspective.

(Source: Aniplex Online Fest 2025)

metas.name: Biblia Koshodou no Jiken Techou
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Mystery
Tags:Work/Female Protagonist
Biblia Koshodou no Jiken Techou is a mystery series where Shinokawa Shioriko, a young owner of a bookstore in Kamakura, unravel mysteries of ancient books that are taken there.

The story begins with a young man named Daisuke, who grew up practically without reading books due to a "phobia," brings the complete (and autographed) works of Natsume Soseki, Japanese writer of the Meiji era, inherited from his grandmother in the mysterious bookstore. Will the shy and introvert Shioriko solve the mystery of the books?

metas.name: Watari Tori to Katatsumuri
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Comedy, Slice of Life Tags: Unpei Mochizuki had been working for two years as a spare parts dealer. After making a mistake, he had only one wish: to go far, where no one can recognize him. That’s when he crosses paths with Tsugumi Nagisa, illustrator… and nomad. A woman of indefinable age, who lives with her dog in a van. Unpei begins a new life on the road with Tsugumi and her car. Far from the usual tidy, sedentary lifestyle, the nomadic spirit offers new surprises every single day. From beaches to mountains, from the North to the South… Freedom and endless new landscapes await!

(Source: Noeve grafx, translated)

metas.name: Namida Ame to Serenade
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Supernatural Tags:Heterosexual/Josei On rainy days, Hina has dreams about her younger self playing with a mysterious boy in a garden she's never seen before—until, by chance, she stumbles upon the place. There's a young man there, Takaaki, who mistakes Hina for his fiancée Hinako. He whisks her back to what he thinks is her home, where Hina's doppelganger is waiting, and Hina realizes this isn't the Tokyo she left behind but Japan in the year 1907! Is this all a dream or something much stranger?

(Source: Kodansha USA)

metas.name: Umi ga Hashiru End Roll
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Drama, Slice of Life Tags:Female Protagonist/Elderly Protagonist/Filmmaking/Photography/Primarily Adult Cast/College/Shoujo/Iyashikei Umiko, a grandma, realizes that she has the same desire to make movies as university student Kai—and soon she enrolls in Kai's film school!

"It's not the movies you like…you like watching the people watching the movies."

Just what are you going to do with the rest of your life? It's the question you'll always have to answer, no matter your age. Umiko Chino is a 65-year-old retired woman in mourning for her late husband. Remembering how they used to watch films together, Umiko goes to the movie theater for the first time in years, where she meets Kai, an attractive, ambiguous young man who studies filmmaking at a nearby art school.

They would seem to have nothing in common, except for this—both of them sometimes like to look more at the way the audience reacts to a movie than the movie itself. Kai believes Umiko has the same deep desire he possesses to experience how people respond to something they made… and challenges her to stake the rest of her life discovering that thrill.

Soon Umiko surprises herself by enrolling in the same film school as Kai. But sailing into this new sea, she's suddenly inside the currents of her fellow students' lives, a much younger generation that she struggles to understand, driven by their own passions and their own relationships. Who's really experienced at life, and is it old age or observation that brings wisdom? And does what you're looking for change when you look with your eyes instead of through a camera lens…?

(Source: Dark Horse)

metas.name: DEATH STRANDING ISOLATIONS (Working Title)
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Horror, Sci-Fi, Supernatural Tags: An original anime series based on the “Death Stranding” video game.

Once, there was an explosion...

Lonesome souls of the dead manifest in the physical world, reaching in search of the living. However, the connection they create triggers a massive explosion that eradicates anything of this world—a phenomenon referred to as the Death Stranding. These events wipe out nations as well as civilization itself. People who remain are now isolated, withdrawn, and without connections. As humanity stands at the brink a legendary porter set out to transport both cargo and wishes of its senders, reconnecting people in the hope that they might still be saved.

Somewhere in North America, just as Sam Bridges walks through the continent in order to save America, the someones are also trying to deal with their isolation in their own way. An old man trying to realize salvation through ways outside of the connection advocated by Bridges. A female warrior who tries to kickstart a world of constant fighting. A boy with a grudge against Bridges. A girl who embraces loneliness.

On the precipice of the end of humanity and the world, their fates and hopes converge, as another story of Death Stranding begins.
And now, comes another explosion...

(Source: KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS, edited)

Note: Title and Relations are provisional and will be updated when more info is announced.

metas.name: Douluo Dalu: 9528
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy
Tags:
Tang San and Xiao Wu return to the collapsed Slaughter City, now devastated by the Snow Swan Kiss. They face relentless pursuit from the mutated Slaughter King, only to be saved by a mysterious girl whose rescue conceals dark secrets. Together, Tang San and Xiao Wu must uncover the truth behind Slaughter City's corruption.

metas.name: Yuan Zun (2027)
metas.description: Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags: Remake of Dragon Prince Yuan 3D.

metas.name: Charisma
metas.description:
Genres: 
"They're just ordinary guys."

Arranged by the mysterious Fumiya Itou, a seven-person sharehouse has become home to a group of charismatic guys, taking on the name "Charisma House." From the "dog for the people" Iori Motohashi to rebellious "just say no!" Kei Sarukawa, each member has their own unique charisma that they nurture day by day. Whether it's Amahiko Tendou fulfilling his role as World Sexy Ambassador, or Terra falling in love with his own reflection, or Ohse Minato attempting to jump out of another window, the Charisma House is always lively, even if it challenges Rikai Kusanagi's attempts to maintain rigid order. Ordinary people just wouldn't understand.

Despite what people might say about their unique habits, other's opinions can't faze the Charismas, who simply turn adversities into fuel to power their "Charisma Charge." But what might happen when this charge fills up..?!

(Source: MAL News)

metas.name: Shouzen
metas.description:
Genres: Slice of Life, Supernatural Tags: Douzen, a Taoist priest who travels the land, one day encounters a young girl raised by a yokai. Unfamiliar with human emotions or affection, Douzen gives her the name Shouzen and decides to take her along on his travels as his disciple. What is goodness? What is love? Thus begins a journey of spiritual training for Shouzen as she grows into a human being.

(Source: Fuji TV, translated)

metas.name: Jian Lai Movie: Shisan Zhi Zheng
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy
Tags: Historical/Martial Arts
Set against a thousand-year war between the Human Clan and the Demon Clan, the story follows a 13 vs. 13 death match, where seven victories decide life and death.

While the humans secure six early wins through tactical foresight, a hidden scheme emerges—one that could determine the fate of the Sword Qi Great Wall.

(Source: Tencent YouTube Channel)
